nasb.text: But the Lord of hosts revealed Himself to me, “Surely this iniquity shall not be forgiven you Until you die,” says the Lord God of hosts.

esv.text: The Lord of hosts has revealed himself in my ears: “Surely this iniquity will not be atoned for you until you die,” says the Lord God of hosts.

cnv.text: 萬軍之耶和華親自啟示我說： “直到你們死的時候， 這罪孽也不得赦免。”這是主萬軍之耶和華說的。

ccb.text: 万军之耶和华启示我说： “你们这罪到死也得不到赦免。 这是主——万军之耶和华说的。”

csbs.text: 万军之耶和华亲自启示我： “这罪孽，你们到死也绝不会赎清！” 这是主万军之耶和华说的。
